entry.value:
{"currentConversationId":"0a1ec4a6-6365-46e6-b222-033b5ca2f120","conversations":{"0a1ec4a6-6365-46e6-b222-033b5ca2f120":{"id":"0a1ec4a6-6365-46e6-b222-033b5ca2f120","createdAtIso":"2025-08-15T16:37:59.218Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-08-15T16:37:59.218Z","chatHistory":[],"feedbackStates":{},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"I have a PHP project based for statistics students, but it has a very old PHP version. right now, I would like the project be:
- compatible with PHP 8.4
- have correct char encoding
- repair any security vulnerabilities (i see some XSS issues in the project)
- re-do project structure to be more understanding","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"I have a PHP project based for statistics students, but it has a very old PHP version. right now, I would like the project be:"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"- compatible with PHP 8.4"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"- have correct char encoding"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"- repair any security vulnerabilities (i see some XSS issues in the project)"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"- re-do project structure to be more understanding"}]}]},"mentioned_items":[],"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"39685237-2963-4410-bdb3-bd45c8e875c4"}},"agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[]}
